hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.swift ]]; then echo '[Hook] Swift edit: no force unwraps, use [weak self] in closures' >&2; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.swift ]] && [ -f "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ]; then grep -n 'print(' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '//' | head -5 | while read line; do echo "[Hook] print() found: $line" >&2; done; fi
